TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Djelunavunavuk, title = Djelunavunavuk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Djelunavunavuk} }

S.FORM: Djelunavunavuk Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Djelunavunavuk a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 116 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 112 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 4 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko .
S.PHON: …¨~…ģj…ô…ĺo~u~unab~vo~u~unab~vo~u~uk itiniaj i *inf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u …¨~…ģj…ô…ĺo~u~unab~vo~u~unab~vo~u~uk a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u .
S.FORM: Djelunavunavuk Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Djelunavunavuk a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 116 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 112 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 4 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko .
